title: tdoerks/arbor pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 must be provided (paired-end only), cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

host.errorMessage: Optional host/source (e.g. bovine) — used to colour the dashboard phylogeny tips

date.errorMessage: Optional collection date (e.g. 2026-03) — used to colour the dashboard phylogeny tips

location.errorMessage: Optional collection location (e.g. KS) — used to colour the dashboard phylogeny tips
